'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=OH4S3pBOYShz1kVleK1Mq8t6vZ.bvgWQGIwcWrWa7zU-1774799564-1.0.1.1-RA1fUvdJZ2O8nA1Y2XB_4weuA1a_OWT8XCIi0No08sI"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
